title: Advanced Gradient Builder
description: As a user, I want a gradient bar where I can place multiple color flags/markers so that I can create complex gradients with custom spacing and color order, rather than being limited to just 2 colors.
acceptanceCriteria: UI includes a gradient bar representing the button's background/border.
Users can click the bar to add new color markers (more than 2).
Markers can be dragged left/right to adjust color stops (spacing).
Each marker's color can be changed using the advanced color palette.
